summary: The running container serves a custom browser root, mobile noVNC defaults, and an injected mobile control layer on `mobile.html`.

checks.name: CHECK-01: Mobile noVNC defaults are served
checks.expected: defaults.json exposes scaled resize, reconnect, and websockify path defaults
checks.actual: defaults.json returns resize=scale, reconnect=true, reconnect_delay=2500, show_dot=true, and path=websockify.

checks.name: CHECK-02: mobile.html exists and includes the mobile overlay assets
checks.expected: mobile.html is available and injects the project-owned CSS/JS overlay
checks.actual: mobile.html is served successfully and includes `mobile-vnc.css`, `mobile-vnc.js`, and the overridden browser title.
